Continuous rain for seven days in any season other than the
monsoon forebodes the death of the chief monarch. Should there be

a rain of bloody there would be war; if one of flesh, bones, marrow
or the like (i.e. ghee, oil etc.), epidemics; if one of corn, gold, tree-
barks, fruits, flowers etc. (i.e. leaves and the like), peril; and if one
of burning coal or dust, the particular town would be destroyed.
